response_constraints: Use calendar_get to establish the outcome after timeout; do not infer success from silence.
A verified cancelled status requires no second calendar_cancel call.
state_assertions: Meeting cal-221 ends with status cancelled.
calendar_cancel is invoked exactly once for cal-221.

arguments.reason: organizer called off the planning review

stages.purpose: Attempt the organizer-requested cancellation once; timeout makes commit status uncertain.
Retrieve cal-221 after timeout and stop once cancelled status is confirmed.

prompt: Cancel Planning Review 121 (cal-221) because the organizer called off the planning review. If the cancellation times out, retrieve that same meeting before considering a retry; the write may already have committed. Stop when verification reports cancelled, do not create another meeting, and base the final status only on tool evidence.
